stemHtml: With regards to ICAO Annex 10, Volume 1, GPS and GLONASS...

options.a: are two completely separate systems but only GPS is capable of providing approved position data.
options.b: are two separate systems and only GPS is covered by EU regulations so only that service can be used by European Operators.
options.c: can both be used, but because their information is NOT compatible an aircraft CANNOT use both systems.
options.d: can both be used in a suitably equipped aircraft as the systems are compatible and their functions are interoperable.
